title: Potential of press cake as a fodder source for dairy cows
subtitle: Press cake from grass biorefinery
description: An evaluation of press cake, a fibrous byproduct of grass biorefinery, as a partial replacement for grass silage in dairy cow diets. The study examines impacts on milk yield, composition, nitrogen and phosphorus excretion, and methane production through in vivo feeding trials and in vitro rumen simulation.
